languages.text: "Разверни тезис, Эоганн. Почему победа над смертью так важна для тебя?"
"Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"
languages.original_text: "Разверни тезис, Эоганн. Почему победа над смертью так важна для тебя?"

traits.locale_text: "Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"
"Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"
"Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"

languages.text: "Führt Eure These aus, Eogunn. Warum ist es Euch so wichtig, den Tod zu besiegen?"
languages.original_text: "Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"

traits.locale_text: "Führt Eure These aus, Eogunn. Warum ist es Euch so wichtig, den Tod zu besiegen?"

languages.text: « Dites-m'en plus, Eogunn. Pourquoi est-il si important pour vous de vaincre la mort ? »
languages.original_text: "Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"

traits.locale_text: « Dites-m'en plus, Eogunn. Pourquoi est-il si important pour vous de vaincre la mort ? »

languages.text: “详细阐述你的观点，伊奥贡。为何战胜死亡对你如此重要？”
languages.original_text: "Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"

traits.locale_text: “详细阐述你的观点，伊奥贡。为何战胜死亡对你如此重要？”

languages.text: «Profundice en su tesis, Eogunn. ¿Por qué es tan importante para usted vencer a la muerte?».
languages.original_text: "Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"

traits.locale_text: «Profundice en su tesis, Eogunn. ¿Por qué es tan importante para usted vencer a la muerte?».

languages.text: "エオガンヌ、論文を拡大せよ。死に打ち勝つことが、なぜあなたにとってそれほど重要なのですか？"
languages.original_text: "Expand the thesis, Eoghanne. Why is defeating death so important to you?"

languages.text: "Tezini detaylandır Eogunn. Ölümü yenmek senin için neden bu kadar önemli?"
languages.original_text: "Elaborate on your thesis, Eogunn. Why is vanquishing death so important to you?"

traits.locale_text: "Tezini detaylandır Eogunn. Ölümü yenmek senin için neden bu kadar önemli?"
